title: Nandanvan Jungle Safari

overview.short: Nava Raipur, officially known as Atal Nagar-Nava Raipur, is a planned city and fully Greenfield city in Indian state of Chhattisgarh.
overview.description: Nava Raipur, officially known as Atal Nagar-Nava Raipur, is a planned city and fully Greenfield city in Indian state of Chhattisgarh. It is planned to replace Raipur as the capital city of Chhattisgarh. The Government of Chhattisgarh, the state's administrative body is situated here. The city is located between National Highway 53 and National Highway 30, about 17 km south-east of the capital city Raipur.

howToReach.roadNote: Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

topPlaces.name: Purkhouti Muktangan
topPlaces.description: Purkhouti Muktangan is a 24.2-hectare (60-acre) cultural and sculpture garden in Naya Raipur, Chhattisgarh, India. Established in 2006 and inaugurated by former President A. P. J. Abdul Kalam, it offers a glimpse into the Chhattisgarh culture through its display of the habitat, artifacts, art, folk dances, and food habits of the state's tribal communities.

topPlaces.name: Abhanpur
topPlaces.description: Abhanpur is a tehsil (administrative division) in Raipur District, Chhattisgarh, India. It is a part of the Naya Raipur township.

topPlaces.name: Atal Park
topPlaces.description: Atal Park (formerly Central Park) is a public urban park located in Naya Raipur, the new capital of Chhattisgarh, India. Central Park is located on Central Avenue Road on 35 acres of land.

topPlaces.name: Indrawati Bhawan
topPlaces.description: Indrawati Bhawan, commonly known as the Directorate Building, is the primary administrative headquarters for nearly 60 directorates of the Government of Chhattisgarh. Located in Sector 19 of Nava Raipur, it stands as the executive counterpart to the state secretariat, Mahanadi Bhawan.

topPlaces.name: Mahanadi Bhawan
topPlaces.description: Mahanadi Bhawan is the official State Secretariat of the Government of Chhattisgarh, located in Sector 19 of Nava Raipur (formerly Naya Raipur). It serves as the administrative headquarters where the Chief Minister, Cabinet Ministers, and senior bureaucrats (IAS officers) manage the state's governance.

topPlaces.name: Bhatgaon, Raipur
topPlaces.description: Bhatgaon is a town and a Nagar Panchayat in Raipur district in the state of Chhattisgarh, India.

Atal Park (formerly Central Park) is a public urban park located in Naya Raipur, the new capital of Chhattisgarh, India. Central Park is located on Central Avenue Road on 35 acres of land.

Indrawati Bhawan, commonly known as the Directorate Building, is the primary administrative headquarters for nearly 60 directorates of the Government of Chhattisgarh. Located in Sector 19 of Nava Raipur, it stands as the executive counterpart to the state secretariat, Mahanadi Bhawan.

Mahanadi Bhawan is the official State Secretariat of the Government of Chhattisgarh, located in Sector 19 of Nava Raipur (formerly Naya Raipur). It serves as the administrative headquarters where the Chief Minister, Cabinet Ministers, and senior bureaucrats (IAS officers) manage the state's governance.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Nandanvan Jungle Safari?
faq.a: The best time to visit Nandanvan Jungle Safari is Oct – Mar. Summers are 26–40°C and winters are 12–28°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Nandanvan Jungle Safari?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Swami Vivekananda Airport, Raipur (10 km) and the nearest railway station is Raipur Junction (23 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Nandanvan Jungle Safari?
faq.a: 2 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Nandanvan Jungle Safari at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Nandanvan Jungle Safari?
faq.a: Stays in Nandanvan Jungle Safari start from ₹2,500 per night, with options across 5 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Nandanvan Jungle Safari?
faq.a: The top attractions are Purkhouti Muktangan, Abhanpur, Atal Park, Indrawati Bhawan, Mahanadi Bhawan.
